warehouseHome.metaDescription: Dashboard for warehouse staff to confirm orders and update order statuses.
warehouseHome.title: Welcome, warehouse staff
warehouseHome.subtitle: Use the core feature groups below for daily operations.

confirmOrders.title: Confirm orders
confirmOrders.description: Review order details and confirm orders that are ready for processing.

updateOrderStatus.title: Update order status
updateOrderStatus.description: Track fulfillment progress and update order status at each processing step.

updateProductQuantity.title: Update product quantity
updateProductQuantity.description: Search products and adjust inventory quantities up or down.

confirmPanel.empty: There are no orders waiting for confirmation.

stockSearchPanel.description: Search for the product to adjust, then open its stock update form.
stockSearchPanel.empty: No products match the current filters.

stockUpdatePanel.description: Review product information and update inventory quantity.
stockUpdatePanel.invalidQuantity: Adjustment quantity must be greater than 0.

adminHome.metaDescription: Administration dashboard with product, promotion, and reporting actions.
adminHome.title: Welcome, admin
adminHome.subtitle: The actions below are dummy placeholders for the next implementation phase.

adminCreateProduct.pageSubtitle: Fill in product information to create a new product record.

form.title: Create new product
form.description: Required fields must pass frontend and backend validation before saving.

adminUpdateProduct.pageSubtitle: Search for a product, update editable fields, and save changes to the product profile.

search.title: Find product to update
search.description: Use keyword and filters to find the product you want to edit.

form.title: Update product information
form.description: All required fields must satisfy backend validation before saving.

placeholders.description: Detailed description in plain text or HTML

errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired or you are not authorized. Please sign in as admin again.
